title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA) and rotating credentials.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and mitigate ransomware activity in cloud environments.
Conduct regular backups of critical data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments to prevent ransomware access.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: The Quiz And Survey Master plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary Shortcode Execution in...
description: The Quiz And Survey Master plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary Shortcode Execution in versions up to and including 11.1.0. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and the execution of do_shortcode() on user-submitted quiz answer text. User-submitted answers pass through sanitize_text_field() and htmlspecialchars(), which only strip HTML tags but do not encode or remove shortcode brackets [ and ]. When quiz results are displayed, the plugin calls do_shortcode() on the entire re

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5797.

title: A vulnerability has been found in Mobatek MobaXterm Home Edition up to 26.1. This affects an...
description: A vulnerability has been found in Mobatek MobaXterm Home Edition up to 26.1. This affects an unknown part in the library msimg32.dll. The manipulation leads to uncontrolled search path. An attack has to be approached locally. The attack is considered to have high complexity. It is indicated that the exploitability is difficult. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 26.2 is able to mitigate this issue. It is suggested to upgrade the affected component.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Mobatek MobaXterm Home Edition up to version 26.1 allows for an uncontrolled search path attack via the msimg32.dll library. While the attack requires local access and is considered complex, the public disclosure of the exploit increases the risk of exploitation. Successful exploitation could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code or compromise the integrity of the system.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to MobaXterm version 26.2 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict local access to systems running affected versions of MobaXterm to trusted personnel only.
Monitor for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation on systems using the vulnerable software.

title: An OS command injection vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow a user...
description: An OS command injection vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow a user with an administrative privilege to execute an arbitrary OS command.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21719.

title: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized course content manipulation in versions up to and including 3.9.8. This is due to a missing authorization check in the tutor_update_course_content_order() function. The function only validates the nonce (CSRF protection) but does not verify whether the user has permission to manage course content. The can_user_manage() authorization check only executes when the 'content_parent' parameter is pr

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5502.

title: The Kubio plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload in versions up to and...
description: The Kubio plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload in versions up to and including 2.7.2. This is due to insufficient capability checks in the kubio_rest_pre_insert_import_assets() function, which is hooked to the rest_pre_insert_{post_type} filter for posts, pages, templates, and template parts. When a post is created or updated via the REST API, Kubio parses block attributes looking for URLs in the 'kubio' attribute namespace and automatically imports them via importRemoteFi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5427.

title: The LatePoint plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all...
description: The LatePoint plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 5.3.2. The vulnerability exists because the OsStripeConnectController::create_payment_intent_for_transaction action is registered as a public action (no authentication required) and loads invoices by sequential integer invoice_id without any access_key or ownership verification. This is in contrast to other invoice-related actions (view_by_key, payment_form, summary_before_p

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized users to access and manipulate sensitive invoice data, potentially leading to data breaches, financial fraud, or unauthorized access to payment systems.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Immediately update the LatePoint plugin to the latest patched version once available or disable the plugin if no patch is provided.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to monitor and block unauthorized access attempts to the vulnerable endpoint.
Review and restrict public access to sensitive actions in WordPress plugins, ensuring proper authentication and access control mechanisms are in place.

title: The Tutor LMS plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection in versions up to and including...
description: The Tutor LMS plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection in versions up to and including 3.9.8. This is due to insufficient escaping on the 'date' parameter combined with direct interpolation into a SQL fragment before being passed to $wpdb->prepare(). This makes it possible for authenticated attackers with Admin-level access and above to append additional SQL queries and extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6080.

title: An SQL injection vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow an attacker to...
description: An SQL injection vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow an attacker to execute an arbitrary SQL statement on the product.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in CubeCart prior to version 6.6.0 could allow attackers to execute arbitrary SQL statements, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, data manipulation, or complete compromise of the database.
recommended_actions: Immediately update CubeCart to version 6.6.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of your CubeCart installation to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access.
Implement web application firewalls (WAFs) to detect and block SQL injection attempts.

title: A path traversal vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow a user with an...
description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in CubeCart prior to 6.6.0, which may allow a user with an administrative privilege to access higher-level directories that should not be accessible.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35496.

title: The Rapid7 Insight Agent (versions > 4.1.0.2) is vulnerable to a local privilege escalation...
description: The Rapid7 Insight Agent (versions > 4.1.0.2) is vulnerable to a local privilege escalation attack that allows users to gain SYSTEM level control of a Windows host. Upon startup the agent service attempts to load an OpenSSL configuration file from a non-existent directory that is writable by standard users. By planting a crafted openssl.cnf file an attacker can trick the high-privilege service into executing arbitrary commands. This effectively permits an unprivileged user to bypass security con

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges to SYSTEM level on Windows hosts, potentially leading to full control of the affected system. This could result in unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or further exploitation within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Rapid7 Insight Agent to the latest patched version if available or apply any provided mitigations from the vendor.
Restrict write permissions on directories accessible to standard users to prevent exploitation of the vulnerability.
Monitor systems for signs of exploitation, such as unexpected changes to the OpenSSL configuration file or unauthorized privilege escalations.

title: Vault is vulnerable to a denial-of-service condition where an unauthenticated attacker can...
description: Vault is vulnerable to a denial-of-service condition where an unauthenticated attacker can repeatedly initiate or cancel root token generation or rekey operations, occupying the single in-progress operation slot. This prevents legitimate operators from completing these workflows. This vulnerability, CVE-2026-5807, is fixed in Vault Community Edition 2.0.0 and Vault Enterprise 2.0.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to cause a denial-of-service condition by exploiting the single in-progress operation slot for root token generation or rekey operations. This can disrupt critical workflows, potentially halting administrative tasks and impacting system availability.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to Vault Community Edition 2.0.0 or Vault Enterprise 2.0.0 to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement rate-limiting or access controls to restrict unauthorized attempts to initiate or cancel root token generation or rekey operations.
Monitor Vault logs for unusual activity and establish alerts for repeated operation initiation or cancellation attempts.

title: Vault’s PKI engine’s ACME validation did not reject local targets when issuing http-01 and tls...
description: Vault’s PKI engine’s ACME validation did not reject local targets when issuing http-01 and tls-alpn-01 challenges. This may lead to these requests being sent to local network targets, potentially leading to information disclosure. Fixed in Vault Community Edition 2.0.0 and Vault Enterprise 2.0.0, 1.21.5, 1.20.10, and 1.19.16.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5052.

title: The wpForo Forum plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data due to...
description: The wpForo Forum plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data due to the use of `extract($args, EXTR_OVERWRITE)` on user-controlled input in the `edit()` method of `classes/Posts.php` in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.16. The `post_edit` action handler in `Actions.php` passes `$_REQUEST['post']` directly to `Posts::edit()`, which calls `extract($args, EXTR_OVERWRITE)`. An attacker can inject `post[guestposting]=1` to overwrite the local `$guestposting` variable

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4666.

title: The Form Maker by 10Web plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'ip_search', ...
description: The Form Maker by 10Web plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'ip_search', 'startdate', 'enddate', 'username_search', and 'useremail_search' parameters in all versions up to, and including, 1.15.40. This is due to the `WDW_FM_Library::validate_data()` method calling `stripslashes()` on user input (removing WordPress's `wp_magic_quotes()` protection) and the `FMModelSubmissions_fm::get_labels_parameters()` function directly concatenating user-supplied values into SQL queries

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform SQL Injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database manipulation, or full compromise of the WordPress site. Exploitation could also enable attackers to exfiltrate or delete critical information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Form Maker by 10Web plugin to the latest patched version (if available) or disable the plugin temporarily.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious SQL Injection attempts.
Review and sanitize user inputs in custom WordPress plugins or themes to prevent similar vulnerabilities.

title: The JetBackup – Backup, Restore & Migrate plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Path Traversal...
description: The JetBackup – Backup, Restore & Migrate plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Path Traversal leading to Arbitrary Directory Deletion in versions up to and including 3.1.19.8. This is due to insufficient input validation on the fileName parameter in the file upload handler. The plugin sanitizes the fileName parameter using sanitize_text_field(), which removes HTML tags but does not prevent path traversal sequences like '../'. The unsanitized filename is then directly concatenated in Upload::get

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4853.

title: An authenticated user with access to a kvv2 path through a policy containing a glob may be able...
description: An authenticated user with access to a kvv2 path through a policy containing a glob may be able to delete secrets they were not authorized to read or write, resulting in denial-of-service. This vulnerability did not allow a malicious user to delete secrets across namespaces, nor read any secret data. Fxed in Vault Community Edition 2.0.0 and Vault Enterprise 2.0.0, 1.21.5, 1.20.10, and 1.19.16.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3605.

title: If a Vault auth mount is configured to pass through the "Authorization" header, and the ...
description: If a Vault auth mount is configured to pass through the "Authorization" header, and the "Authorization" header is used to authenticate to Vault, Vault forwarded the Vault token to the auth plugin backend. Fixed in 2.0.0, 1.21.5, 1.20.10, and 1.19.16.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability could lead to unauthorized access or leakage of sensitive Vault tokens, potentially exposing critical secrets and compromising authentication mechanisms.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of Vault (2.0.0, 1.21.5, 1.20.10, or 1.19.16).
Audit and monitor logs for any unauthorized access or suspicious activity related to the 'Authorization' header.
Review and update configurations to ensure the 'Authorization' header is not improperly passed to auth plugin backends.

title: The MasterStudy LMS WordPress Plugin for Online Courses and Education plugin for WordPress is...
description: The MasterStudy LMS WordPress Plugin for Online Courses and Education plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Time-based Blind SQL Injection via the 'order' and 'orderby' parameters in the /lms/stm-lms/order/items REST API endpoint in versions up to and including 3.7.25. This is due to insufficient input sanitization combined with a design flaw in the custom Query builder class that allows unquoted SQL injection in ORDER BY clauses. When the Query builder detects parentheses in the sort_by paramet

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4817.

title: The Royal Addons for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting...
description: The Royal Addons for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the Instagram Feed widget's 'instagram_follow_text' setting in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.1056 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5162.

title: The WP Statistics plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up...
description: The WP Statistics plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 14.16.4. This is due to missing capability checks on multiple AJAX handlers including `wp_statistics_get_filters`, `wp_statistics_getPrivacyStatus`, `wp_statistics_updatePrivacyStatus`, and `wp_statistics_dismiss_notices`. These endpoints only verify a `wp_rest` nonce via `check_ajax_referer()` but do not enforce any capability checks such as `current_user_can()` or the plugin's ow

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the WP Statistics plugin allows unauthorized users to access and modify sensitive plugin settings via AJAX handlers, potentially leading to data exposure, privacy violations, or disruption of analytics functionality.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the WP Statistics plugin to the latest patched version if available.
Restrict access to the affected AJAX endpoints using server-side rules or a Web Application Firewall (WAF).
Audit user permissions and implement stronger capability checks for plugin-related actions.

title: CVE-2026-2712 - The WP-Optimize plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of functionality due to mi
description: The WP-Optimize plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of functionality due to missing capability checks in the `receive_heartbeat()` function in `includes/class-wp-optimize-heartbeat.php` in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.0. This is due to the Heartbeat handler directly invoking `Updraft_Smush_Manager_Commands` methods without verifying user capabilities, nonce tokens, or the allowed commands whitelist that the normal AJAX handler (`updraft_smush_ajax`) enforces. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to invoke admin-only Smush operations including reading log files (`get_smush_logs`), deleting all backup images (`clean_all_backup_images`), triggering bulk image processing (`process_bulk_smush`), and modifying Smush options (`update_smush_options`).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2712.

title: CVE-2026-25203 - Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Incorrect Default Permissions Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
description:
Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Incorrect Default Permissions Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability


This issue affects MagicINFO 9 Server: less than 21.1091.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server allows local attackers to escalate privileges due to incorrect default permissions. This could enable unauthorized access to sensitive data, system manipulation, or further exploitation of the server.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server to version 21.1091.1 or later to address the vulnerability.
Restrict local access to the server and ensure proper user permissions are configured to minimize exploitation risks.
Perform a security audit of the affected systems to identify any signs of compromise or unauthorized access.

title: CVE-2026-1924 - The Aruba HiSpeed Cache plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all vers
description: The Aruba HiSpeed Cache plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 3.0.4. This is due to missing nonce verification on the `ahsc_ajax_reset_options()` function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to reset all plugin settings to their default values via a forged request granted they can trick a site administrator into performing an action such as clicking on a link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1924.

title: CVE-2026-1263 - The Webling plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to,
description: The Webling plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 3.9.0 due to insufficient input sanitization, insufficient output escaping, and missing capabilities checks in the 'webling_admin_save_form' and 'webling_admin_save_memberlist' functions. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to inject Webling forms and memberlists with arbitrary web scripts that will execute whenever an administrator views the related form or memberlist area of the WordPress admin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1263.

title: CVE-2026-5995 - A weakness has been identified in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Impacted is the function se
description: A weakness has been identified in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Impacted is the function setMiniuiHomeInfoShow of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument lan_info can lead to os command injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5995.

title: CVE-2026-5994 - A security flaw has been discovered in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This issue affects the
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This issue affects the function setTelnetCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument telnet_enabled results in os command injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5994.

title: CVE-2026-5993 - A vulnerability was identified in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This vulnerability affects
description: A vulnerability was identified in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This vulnerability affects the function setWiFiGuestCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component CGI Handler. Such manipulation of the argument wifiOff leads to os command injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5993.

title: CVE-2026-5992 - A vulnerability was determined in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. This affects the function fromP2pListFilter of
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. This affects the function fromP2pListFilter of the file /goform/P2pListFilter. This manipulation of the argument page causes stack-based buffer overflow. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5992.

title: CVE-2026-5991 - A vulnerability was found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected by this issue is the function formWrlExtra
description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected by this issue is the function formWrlExtraSet of the file /goform/WrlExtraSet. The manipulation of the argument GO results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5991.

title: CVE-2026-5990 - A vulnerability has been found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected by this vulnerability is the function
description: A vulnerability has been found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected by this vulnerability is the function fromSafeEmailFilter of the file /goform/SafeEmailFilter. The manipulation of the argument page leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5990.

title: CVE-2026-5989 - A flaw has been found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected is the function fromRouteStatic of the file /g
description: A flaw has been found in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7. Affected is the function fromRouteStatic of the file /goform/RouteStatic. Executing a manipulation of the argument page can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5989.

title: CVE-2026-5460 - A heap use-after-free exists in wolfSSL's TLS 1.3 post-quantum cryptography (PQC) hybrid KeyShare pr
description: A heap use-after-free exists in wolfSSL's TLS 1.3 post-quantum cryptography (PQC) hybrid KeyShare processing. In the error handling path of TLSX_KeyShare_ProcessPqcHybridClient() in src/tls.c, the inner function TLSX_KeyShare_ProcessPqcClient_ex() frees a KyberKey object upon encountering an error. The caller then invokes TLSX_KeyShare_FreeAll(), which attempts to call ForceZero() on the already-freed KyberKey, resulting in writes of zero bytes over freed heap memory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5460.

title: CVE-2026-5448 - X.509 date buffer overflow in wolfSSL_X509_notAfter / wolfSSL_X509_notBefore. A buffer overflow may
description: X.509 date buffer overflow in wolfSSL_X509_notAfter / wolfSSL_X509_notBefore. A buffer overflow may occur when parsing date fields from a crafted X.509 certificate via the compatibility layer API. This is only triggered when calling these two APIs directly from an application, and does not affect TLS or certificate verify operations in wolfSSL.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5448.

title: CVE-2026-5393 - Dual-Algorithm CertificateVerify out-of-bounds read. When processing a dual-algorithm CertificateVer
description: Dual-Algorithm CertificateVerify out-of-bounds read. When processing a dual-algorithm CertificateVerify message, an out-of-bounds read can occur on crafted input. This can only occur when --enable-experimental and --enable-dual-alg-certs is used when building wolfSSL.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5393.

title: CVE-2026-5392 - Heap out-of-bounds read in PKCS7 parsing. A crafted PKCS7 message can trigger an OOB read on the hea
description: Heap out-of-bounds read in PKCS7 parsing. A crafted PKCS7 message can trigger an OOB read on the heap. The missing bounds check is in the indefinite-length end-of-content verification loop in PKCS7_VerifySignedData().

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5392.
